body: {"rationale":"Strong bead. Title is imperative and names subsystem + change. Root cause cites four specific file:line references (execute_bead.go:1239-1252, execute_bead.go:734, execute_bead.go:1246, autocommit.go:67-75). Proposed fix names exact files and line numbers. Non-scope section is explicit and thorough. AC 3 and AC 4 name specific Test* functions with locations; AC 5 is the required `cd cli \u0026\u0026 go test` gate; AC 6 is the lefthook gate. Labels cover phase:2, area:agent, area:git, kind:bug, prevention, observed-failure. One gap: the bead has no `deps` field and no 'no deps' statement in the body — the rubric requires an explicit declaration either way.","score":7,"suggested_fixes":["Add an explicit 'Dependencies: none' line to the description (or a deps/blocked-by field) to satisfy the rubric requirement: 'State no deps if there are none.'"],"waivers_applied":[]}

{"rationale":"All 8 criteria pass. Title is imperative and names subsystem + change ('verify scoped mechanical --no-verify tracker commits'). Description provides PROBLEM, current-state file:line references (execute_bead.go:1433-1496, autocommit.go:76-82), PROPOSED FIX framed correctly as verification-first, and explicit NON-SCOPE. AC is numbered, names two Test* functions by exact symbol (TestTrackerCommit_OnlyCommitsTrackerPath, TestAutoCommit_TargetOnlyPreservesUnrelatedStagedChanges), includes a focused -run filter (AC5), a broad package gate (AC6), and lefthook (AC7). Labels carry phase:2, two area:* tags, kind:bug, and cross-ref labels (reliability, prevention, observed-failure). Parent (ddx-32b3008e) and 'No deps' are explicit. No /tmp references; description is self-contained with no chat-context dependencies. Two minor style notes do not cost points: (1) description header reads 'CURRENT STATE WITH FILE:LINE' rather than the conventional 'ROOT CAUSE WITH file:line' — content is substantively equivalent; (2) type:'bug' is a slight semantic mismatch for a verification/closeout bead, but the 'verification' label and PROPOSED FIX prose compensate clearly.","score":8,"suggested_fixes":["Rename the description section header from 'CURRENT STATE WITH FILE:LINE' to 'ROOT CAUSE WITH FILE:LINE' to match the rubric convention; content is already correct.","Consider type:'chore' or type:'task' rather than type:'bug' since the primary action is verify-and-close, not implement a new fix."],"waivers_applied":[]}

rationale: All acceptance criteria are already satisfied by existing code. No changes needed.

AC1: cli/internal/agent/execute_bead.go:1495 uses `git commit --no-verify --only -m <msg> -- .ddx/beads.jsonl` — path-scoped. VERIFIED.
AC2: cli/internal/git/autocommit.go:76-82 appends `--only -- <basename>` when IncludeStaged is false. VERIFIED.
AC3: TestTrackerCommit_OnlyCommitsTrackerPath exists at tracker_lock_test.go:111 and PASSES.
AC4: TestAutoCommit_TargetOnlyPreservesUnrelatedStagedChanges exists at autocommit_test.go:39 and PASSES.
AC5-6: Full package test suites green.
AC7: lefthook run pre-commit passes.
